Section 205 of the city charter
provides that the city council can
not appropriate city funds to per-
sons or societies unless expressly
provided for in the charter. The
charter does not give the right to
give away city funds for advertising
purposes.


The ordinance APIS states that
the city of Spokane will appropriate
for the advertising of Spokane In
the sum of $4,000, providing the
committee raises $4,000 outside of
the $4,000.


Mr.. Farley did not state when he
would ask for written opinion as
to the legality of the issuing of the
warrant, but said he would request
one.


Corporation Geraghty stated he
would give an opinion when the
comptroller asked for 1t.
